title: Baluster Pitch Angled Slant Shoe with Set Screw - for Use with 1/2" Square Iron Balusters - Set of 10 (Satin Black) - DH-31
features: Angled Shoe can be used on top and bottom of 1/2" Square Baluster. Comes with hex set screw for fastening to the Baluster.
Made from aluminum, powder coated black.
10 Pack, each piece is separately packaged in a bag to prevent scratches and paint chipping
Angled Shoe should be mounted on a slant surface.
Color: Satin Black, perfect and timeless, matching many elements and styles.
description: Decorex Hardware, meeting the needs of our customers, introduces balusters and accessories for railings. Decorex Hardware is a leading brand in home improvement systems. We make sure that even our smallest product meets your requirements. In combination with products from the Decorex Hardware family you will create the design of your dreams. Decorex Hardware Angled Shoes were created to hide the mounting holes for balusters and add classic, finished look to your stairs. They are designed to work perfectly with 1/2" Square Balusters. Angled Shoes are made of high quality powder coated aluminum. A satin finish gives your stairs a classic look. Simple and easy installation. Great for hiding imperfections, holes, damages, gaps which were created during the installation of the balusters. Check out our other products from Decorex Hardware Balusters and Accessories.
